cost_sharing_grid.preventive_care: This plan covers some items and services even if you haven't yet met the deductible amount. But a copayment or coinsurance may apply. For example, this plan covers certain preventive services without cost sharing and before you meet your deductible. See a list of covered preventive services at https://www.healthcare.gov/coverage/preventive-care-benefits/.
cost_sharing_grid.diagnostic_lab: X-ray: $95 / encounter, deductible does not apply Lab tests: $50 / encounter, deductible does not apply.
cost_sharing_grid.generic_drugs_tier1: $19 / prescription (retail). $38 / prescription (mail order), deductible does not apply.
cost_sharing_grid.preferred_brand_tier2: $60 / prescription (retail). $120 / prescription (mail order), after drug deductible.
cost_sharing_grid.nonpreferred_brand_tier3: $60 / prescription (retail). $120 / prescription (mail order), after drug deductible.
cost_sharing_grid.specialty_tier4: 20% coinsurance up to $250 / prescription, after drug deductible.
cost_sharing_grid.mental_health_outpatient: $50 / individual visit, deductible does not apply. No charge for other outpatient services, deductible does not apply.
